title: Gaertner-Write-Tools: propose_skill, propose_skill_change, create_decision_record, update_doc
description: MCP-Write-Tools Gaertner: (1) propose_skill — Skill mit lifecycle=draft, Circular-Check, Depth<=3. (2) propose_skill_change — Change-Proposal. (3) create_decision_record — Epic-Entscheidung dokumentieren, max 3x/Tag. (4) update_doc — Epic-Doc mit Optimistic Locking.
